label: Oblique Shearworks
description: Oblique Shearworks is a precision workshop cut into a narrow interval of absolute shadow between two glare-corridors of Kharion Meridian Confluence. Its interior is laid out as a rectilinear grid of dark crystalline benches and prismatic clamps, each surface ground to fixed angles that capture and vent refracted meridian light as controlled lines. Laminar sky-sheets are admitted through slit apertures, their stable fronts translated into measured shearing planes for scoring, cleaving, and edge-truing vitreous plates. A web of tensile guidewires, anchored to buttressed glass ribs, fixes every toolpath to the city’s lattice geometry and renders deviation immediately visible as misaligned color bands.
